name: Boosted Heavy Salvo

abilities.name: Demoralized Forces
abilities.text: After a friendly unique Cavalier model is killed, one model with this ability must drain a (t) or this crew card is replaced with Heavy Salvo.

abilities.name: Overflowing Supply Crate
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, if it is within 2" of a friendly Assault marker, it may remove the marker to heal 2 and move up to 2".

actions.name: Heavy Bombardment
actions.effects: Make an Assault marker within range, ignoring LoS. Enemy models within (t)12" of the made marker must pass a TN 14 Sp or be dealt 2 damage, ignoring (fortitude) abilities.

extraction_notes: Signature action indicated by (r)(t) symbols before action name
